economic_notes: Dokis First Nation has investments in Migisi Hydro L.P., Okikendawt Hydro L.P., Migisi L.P. General Partner Units, and Ontario First Nation Sovereign Wealth L.P. The ILMF claim settlement of $26,000,000 occurred in prior year (2021), with contribution to Okikendawt Hydro and Dokis Community Trust of $26,000,000 also in 2021.
notes: Revenue includes deferred contributions from beginning of year ($6,742,115) as a revenue line item. The First Nation has equity method investments in Migisi Hydro L.P. and Okikendawt Hydro L.P. In 2021, there was a $26M ILMF claim settlement and corresponding $26M contribution to the Okikendawt Hydro and Dokis Community Trust (prior year one-time items). The 2022 statement shows a First Nation share of Migisi L.P. earnings loss of $(549,777) and loss on disposal of tangible capital assets of $(29,961). Total revenue before deferred contributions end of year is $23,740,248 but deferred contributions end of year of $(11,424,333) reduces excess from general operations. OSR estimated as total revenue minus ISC funding.
